archetype: Archetype 2: The Performance Pro (Tactical Empathy Variant)
design_philosophy: A fusion of elite athleticism precision (Archetype 2) with approachable AI warmth. Designed as a 'mobile-first web app' to simulate the Expo React Native experience. Avoids generic SaaS looks by using deep obsidian backgrounds, vibrant energetic accents, and premium glassmorphic depth.

typography.import_instruction: Import Outfit and Manrope from Google Fonts in index.html.

layout_and_spacing.container: w-full max-w-[430px] mx-auto min-h-screen bg-[#0A0A0A] relative pb-24 shadow-2xl overflow-x-hidden

components.bottom_nav: Fixed bottom-0 w-full max-w-[430px] mx-auto h-20 bg-[#0A0A0A]/80 backdrop-blur-2xl border-t border-white/5 flex justify-around items-center px-4 z-50 rounded-b-[3rem]
components.button_primary: w-full rounded-full px-6 py-4 font-semibold text-white bg-gradient-to-br from-orange-500 to-rose-600 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,94,0,0.3)] transition-all active:scale-95 hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(255,94,0,0.5)]
components.button_secondary: w-full rounded-full px-6 py-4 font-semibold text-white bg-[#1A1A1A] border border-white/10 transition-all active:scale-95 hover:bg-[#222222]
components.card: bg-[#141414] border border-white/5 rounded-3xl p-6 relative overflow-hidden
components.glass_panel: bg-[#1A1A1A]/60 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10 rounded-3xl p-6
components.input_field: w-full bg-[#141414] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl px-5 py-4 text-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-500/50 focus:border-orange-500 outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-neutral-500
components.avatar: w-14 h-14 rounded-full border-2 border-transparent bg-clip-padding

images.description: Manali Tech Logo. Must appear in footer/settings linking to https://manalitech.com.
Dark smooth abstract 3D glassmorphism for onboarding hero background.
Strict Coach profile picture (dark dramatic lighting).
Abstract colorful 3D shape for friendly AI avatars.
Abstract peaceful dark space with glowing green/pink aura for mental wellness features.

motion_and_interactions.philosophy: Animations should feel kinetic and responsive, never sluggish. Emphasize micro-interactions for gamification.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Use Framer Motion to stagger bento grid items on mount (delay: 0.05 * index, y: 20 -> 0, opacity: 0 -> 1).
motion_and_interactions.active_states: All buttons and interactive cards must have active:scale-[0.97] to feel tactile like a native app.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the application as a highly responsive, mobile-first web app mimicking a native Expo mobile experience (restrict max-width to 430px and center it).
Import 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' fonts from Google Fonts.
Enforce the Tactical Empathy dark mode palette strictly; avoid pure black/white where tinted neutral grays add depth.
For the Manali Tech logo, display it prominently in the Settings/Profile screen footer wrapped in an anchor tag linking to https://manalitech.com.
Construct the Dashboard using a Bento grid format (grid-cols-2) with tightly packed cards representing streaks, tasks, mood, water, and focus.
Utilize Framer Motion for micro-interactions (press scale effects) and staggering list entrances.
Implement the Smart Alarm verification UI using an immersive glassmorphic overlay over the dark background.
